title: Dev Environment
subtitle: local IDE wiring
description: Local developer environment for canonical Python tooling, mechanical CMake ownership, measured build baselines, and generated IDE wiring.

children.title: README.md
children.description: Defines canonical local toolchains, build ownership, benchmark evidence, IDE wiring, and module boundaries.

children.title: requirements.lock.txt
children.description: Pins the shared root environment dependencies used by ordinary Studio Python tooling.

children.title: python_run.mjs
children.description: Runs ordinary Studio Python commands through the configured root environment.

children.title: python_check.mjs
children.description: Validates the root environment ownership, interpreter version, and pinned dependencies.

children.title: python_setup.mjs
children.description: Bootstraps the root environment from an explicit repaired base interpreter.

children.title: toolchain_benchmark.mjs
children.description: Measures interpreter startup and cold, warm, and no-op game build costs.

children.title: benchmarks
children.description: Stores measured local toolchain baselines with revision, machine, and dirty-state context.

children.title: cmake_split.test.mjs
children.description: Verifies game-owned CMake concern boundaries and target declaration parity.

children.title: python_contracts.test.mjs
children.description: Verifies active ordinary Python contracts use the canonical Studio runner.

children.title: vscode_projects.mjs
children.description: Generates .vscode/tasks.json and .vscode/launch.json from registered templates and games so VS Code can build packs, build games, and launch each playable project explicitly.

children.title: vscode_projects.test.mjs
children.description: Verifies VS Code project entry generator contracts.
children.role: VS Code project entry generator tests

children.title: .vscode/tasks.json
children.description: Generated VS Code task list for registered templates and games. Regenerate with ai_studio/dev_environment/vscode_projects.mjs.

children.title: .vscode/launch.json
children.description: Generated VS Code launch configurations for registered templates and games. Regenerate with ai_studio/dev_environment/vscode_projects.mjs.
